The scope of work consists of an interior tenant renovation within existing Suites 1320 and 1360 on the 13th floor of an existing high-rise office building at 500 North Broadway, St.?Louis, Missouri. Work includes selective interior demolition; construction of new and modified non-load-bearing partitions, interior glazing, and doors; reconfiguration and renovation of private offices, open office areas, conference and huddle rooms, IT and copy rooms, lunchroom/pantry, and a wellness restroom; installation of new finishes, casework, and countertops; and associated modifications to existing mechanical, electrical, plumbing, fire protection, fire alarm, lighting, ceiling, and data systems to support the new layout. Work also includes accessibility upgrades within the tenant area as shown. There is no change in occupancy classification, construction type, or means of egress, and all work will be fully sprinklered and performed in accordance with the 2021 IBC, applicable energy and accessibility codes, and City of St.?Louis ordinances.

Reconstruction of a two-story residential apartment unit and basement following fire, smoke, water, and secondary plumbing damage. Scope includes replacement and repair of fire-damaged and water-damaged building components, including drywall, insulation, flooring, interior finishes, cabinetry, countertops, doors, trim, paint, and associated plumbing and electrical fixtures. Work includes reconstruction of two bathrooms, kitchen, hallways, bedrooms, living areas, stairs, and basement areas. Electrical and plumbing systems will be evaluated and repaired/replaced as required to meet current code requirements. Installation of code-compliant smoke and carbon monoxide detectors throughout the dwelling is included. All work is intended to restore the structure to a safe, functional, and pre-loss condition. Permit fees, inspections, and any additional code-required upgrades to be coordinated with the City of St. Louis.

Project consists of the removal and replacement of the existing elevated second-story rear deck at the residence. The existing upper deck, including framing, decking, beams, support posts, footings, and guardrails, will be demolished and replaced with a new pressure-treated wood deck supported by new concrete piers. A new composite deck surface and prefabricated aluminum guardrail system will be installed. The existing first-floor patio and stair structure shall remain unchanged, with only the existing first-floor guardrail being replaced to match the new upper deck railing. The existing roof/awning over the deck shall remain. All work shall be performed in accordance with the approved construction drawings and the 2021 International Residential Code (IRC).

Install a 13' x 7' gunite pool.  This pool will be inground (35") and above ground (24").  The current fence on the east side (chain link) will be replaced with a treated wood 72" privacy fence.  The existing chain link fence and gate at the alley will also be replaced with the same privacy fence and self latching gate.  A paver patio will be installed in the back yard.

Construction of a 6-foot-tall wooden privacy fence enclosing the rear yard and parking pad area of the property. The fence consists of pressure-treated wood posts, rails, and dog-ear pickets, with posts set in concrete footings. The design includes a gate for access from the parking pad/alley area and complies with the approved site plan and fence elevations.
